productName: VICE - Blackberry Cream - 100mg THC : 100mg CBD : 5mg CBN
description: A boutique infused beverage with sweet, ripe blackberry notes, a refreshing finish, and the kind of flavor that makes it feel like a treat before the effects even arrive. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. Sip slowly and let the indica infusion settle in at its own pace.
